name: Seapeak LLC 9.00% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Units
summary: Seapeak LLC 9.00% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Units represents preferred equity in Seapeak LLC. These units offer a fixed dividend rate and have priority over common shares in terms of dividend payments and asset distribution. Seapeak LLC is involved in the maritime industry.
